identity.name: A Kind of Order (Union Station × BAND Gallery)
identity.address: Union Station (multi-site) / BAND Gallery (19 Brock Ave, Parkdale)

narrative.summary: Collage art by 4 contemporary artists spread through Union Station. BAND Gallery is Black-owned, bought their own space — unheard of in Toronto arts. Art designed to work at commuter speed — a glance as you walk. Free. Runs through August 2026. 4.6★. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.
